title: Crunchy Floral Spanish Cucumber Salad
description: A bright, brunch‑ready salad featuring crisp cucumber, radish, fragrant herbs, and a sweet‑savory hoisin glaze, finished with toasted almond slivers and edible flowers.
instructions: Rinse the cucumbers, radishes, and onion, then slice them as indicated and place them in a large mixing bowl.
Add the chopped cilantro, basil, edible flowers, and orange zest to the bowl.
In a small jar, whisk together the orange juice, hoisin sauce, olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, rice vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper until the sauce is smooth.
Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss gently to coat everything evenly.
Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle toasted almond slivers over the top for a nutty crunch.
Give the salad one final quick toss and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve immediately on a chilled plate or spoon into individual bowls for a refreshing brunch treat.
Optional: for extra brightness, drizzle a light squeeze of fresh lemon juice right before eating.
Enjoy the floral aroma and crunchy textures of this Spanish cucumber salad.
